features.description: Display all books in a paginated table with sortable columns, quick filters, and search functionality for efficient browsing
userStories: As a library administrator, I want to see all books in a table format so that I can quickly scan the collection
As a catalog manager, I want to view book covers in the table so that I can visually identify books
As a user, I want to navigate through multiple pages of books so that I can browse large collections efficiently
As a catalog manager, I want to filter books by genre so that I can view specific categories
As a user, I want to filter by publication year so that I can find books from a specific era
As a user, I want to quickly search for books from any screen so that I can find books without navigating to search page
acceptanceCriteria: Table displays 6 columns: Cover (thumbnail), Title, Author, Genre, Year, Actions
Cover images display as thumbnails, missing covers show placeholder
Table is sortable by Title, Author, Genre, and Year
Pagination displays showing X-Y of Z books with navigation controls
Dropdown filters for Genre, Author, Year apply immediately
Header search bar performs real-time search across title, author, ISBN
Empty states show helpful messages with actionable next steps
Edit and Delete buttons displayed for each book row
Clicking row navigates to Book Details
+ Add Book button prominent in header

features.description: Comprehensive form for adding new books with required/optional fields, cover image upload, validation, and automatic metadata generation
userStories: As a library administrator, I want to add new books with complete metadata so that the catalog is comprehensive and accurate
As a user, I want to upload book cover images so that books are visually identifiable in the catalog
As a data entry clerk, I want form validation to prevent errors so that I don't submit invalid data
As a user, I want to provide additional book details when available so that the catalog is as complete as possible
acceptanceCriteria: Form displays with 2-column layout (cover upload left, fields right)
Cover image upload supports drag-drop and click-to-upload
Supported image formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP (max 5MB)
Required fields validated: Title, ISBN, Author, Genre, Publication Year, Language
Optional fields accepted: Publisher, Pages, Price, Stock Quantity, Description
ISBN validated for format (ISBN-10/13) and uniqueness in database
Genre dropdown provides 8 options: Fiction, Non-Fiction, Dystopian, Romance, Mystery, Science, Biography, Fantasy
Language dropdown provides 10 options: English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic
Publication year validated: 1000 to current year
Price and stock quantity validated as non-negative
System auto-generates: id, createdAt, updatedAt, isAvailable, viewCount, reviewCount, rating
On successful submission, navigate to Books List with success toast
Cancel button returns to Books List without saving

features.description: Powerful multi-criteria search with quick search option, advanced filters including text fields, dropdowns, ranges, checkboxes, and sort options
userStories: As a user, I want a dedicated search page with advanced options so that I can find books using multiple criteria
As a user, I want to search quickly with a single search box so that I can find books without filling multiple fields
As a user, I want to search by specific fields so that I can narrow results precisely
As a user, I want to filter search results by categorical fields so that I can find books in specific categories
As a user, I want to search for books published within a date range so that I can find books from specific eras
As a user, I want to search for books within a price range so that I can find books fitting my budget
acceptanceCriteria: Quick Search: Large search input matching title, author, ISBN, keywords
Advanced Search form with 12+ fields in 2-column grid layout
Text inputs for: Title, Author, ISBN, Publisher (partial, case-insensitive match)
Dropdown filters for: Genre, Language, Availability (exact match)
Year range: From/To inputs for publication year filtering
Price range: Min/Max inputs for price filtering
Sort Results By dropdown: 8 options including Relevance, Title, Author, Year, Price, Rating
Checkboxes: In Stock Only, On Sale, New Releases
Clear Filters button resets all fields
Search Tips banner provides usage guidance
Results displayed in Books List View with pagination
No results shows helpful message with suggestions
All filled criteria use AND logic

features.description: Pre-populated form for editing existing book details with ISBN immutability, validation, cover image change, and automatic timestamp updates
userStories: As a user, I want to edit book information so that I can correct errors or update details
As a system, I want to load current book data so that the user can see what they're editing
As a user, I want to see book ID and update history so that I know which book I'm editing and when it was last changed
As a user, I want to update the book cover image so that I can replace incorrect or low-quality images
As a user, I want to change any book detail except ISBN so that I can keep information up-to-date
acceptanceCriteria: Form layout identical to Add Book form
All fields pre-populated with current book data
Book ID and Last Updated date displayed in info banner at top
ISBN field is read-only with lock icon, cannot be modified
Cover image preview shows current cover with 'Change Image' button
All fields editable except ISBN, id, createdAt
Same validation rules as Add Book form
System auto-updates: updatedAt timestamp, isAvailable based on stockQuantity
No changes detection shows info toast without submitting
On successful update, navigate to Book Details with success toast
Cancel button returns to Book Details without saving

features.description: Comprehensive book detail view with large cover image, metadata grid, rating display, price box, description, metadata bar, and action buttons
userStories: As a user, I want to view all information about a book so that I can see comprehensive details in one place
As a user, I want to see the book cover prominently so that I can visually identify the book
As a user, I want to see the title, author, and rating clearly so that I can quickly identify the book and its popularity
As a user, I want to see pricing and availability so that I know if the book is in stock and affordable
As a user, I want to see all book metadata so that I have complete information
As a user, I want to read the book description so that I understand what the book is about
As a user, I want to see when the book was added and last updated so that I know data recency
acceptanceCriteria: Left column: Large cover image (~300x450px) with availability badge overlay
Availability badge shows 'In Stock' (green) or 'Out of Stock' (red)
Right column: Title (H1), Author, Rating (stars + numeric + review count), Price box, Details grid, Description
Rating displays as stars with decimal value (e.g., 4.2 / 5.0 with 1,234 reviews)
Price box shows current price, original price (if different), discount, stock quantity
Details grid shows: ISBN, Publisher, Publication Year, Language, Pages, Genre
Description displayed in text block, shows 'No description available' if empty
Metadata bar at bottom shows: Book ID, Added date, Last Updated date, View count
View count incremented automatically on page load
Action buttons at bottom: Edit Book (blue), Duplicate (orange), Export Data (gray), Delete Book (red)
Back button in top-right returns to Books List

features.description: Safe book deletion with modal confirmation showing book details and warning message to prevent accidental deletions
userStories: As a user, I want to delete books that are obsolete or incorrect so that the catalog remains accurate
As a user, I want to confirm deletion with book details shown so that I don't accidentally delete the wrong book
As a user, I want to cancel deletion if I change my mind so that the book is not deleted
As a user, I want to permanently delete the book when I confirm so that it is removed from the catalog
acceptanceCriteria: Red 'Delete Book' button on Book Details screen triggers modal
Modal centered with overlay dimming background
Modal title: '⚠ Confirm Delete' with warning icon
Modal body shows book Title and ISBN in highlighted box
Warning text: 'This action cannot be undone'
Two buttons: 'Cancel' (gray, left) and 'Delete Permanently' (red, right)
Cancel closes modal without deleting
ESC key closes modal without deleting
Clicking outside modal closes without deleting
Delete Permanently sends DELETE request to API
On success, show success toast and navigate to Books List
Deleted book no longer appears in list
Hard delete implementation (permanent removal from database)

features.description: Create copy of existing book to speed up data entry for similar books, with automatic title suffix and required new ISBN
userStories: As a data entry clerk, I want to duplicate books so that I can quickly add similar books with minor changes
As a system, I want to create a duplicate book record so that user can make modifications before saving
As a user, I want to edit the duplicated book before final save so that I can provide unique ISBN and adjust details
acceptanceCriteria: Orange 'Duplicate' button on Book Details screen
Clicking Duplicate creates copy with all fields from original
Title appended with ' (Copy)' suffix
ISBN field cleared (must be unique, user must enter new ISBN)
New id, createdAt, updatedAt generated
viewCount, reviewCount, rating reset to 0/NULL
User navigated to Edit Book Form with duplicated book
User must provide new unique ISBN before saving
Cancel deletes the duplicate without saving

features.description: Download book information in JSON, CSV, or PDF format for external use, reporting, or backup
userStories: As a user, I want to export book data so that I can use it in external systems or create reports
As a user, I want to choose export format so that I can use the data in different applications
acceptanceCriteria: Gray 'Export Data' button on Book Details screen
Clicking button triggers file download (default JSON format)
JSON format: Complete book object with all 18 fields
CSV format: Single-row CSV with headers for spreadsheet import
PDF format: Formatted document with cover image and all details
Filename format: book_{isbn}_{date}.{ext}
File downloaded to user's default download location
Format selection dropdown or query parameter support

features.description: Fully functional and visually appropriate layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices with adaptive navigation and components
userStories: As a mobile user, I want to use the app on my phone so that I can manage books on the go
As a tablet user, I want an optimized layout so that I can use the app comfortably on my tablet
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile (<768px): Single column forms, card layout for book list, hamburger menu
Tablet (768-1024px): 2-column forms maintained, scrollable table or reduced columns
Desktop (>1024px): Full wireframe layout as designed
Header adapts: Logo + search + action button scales appropriately
Filter dropdowns stack vertically on mobile
Navigation remains accessible on all devices
Touch targets minimum 44x44px on mobile
Text remains readable at all sizes
Images scale appropriately without distortion

features.description: Comprehensive loading indicators, success/error notifications, empty states, and visual feedback for all user actions
userStories: As a user, I want to see loading indicators so that I know the system is processing my request
As a user, I want success messages so that I know my action completed
As a user, I want error messages so that I understand what went wrong and how to fix it
acceptanceCriteria: Loading states: Skeleton loaders for tables, spinners for forms, disabled buttons during submission
Success toasts: 'Book added successfully!', 'Book updated successfully!', 'Book deleted permanently'
Error toasts: Specific error messages for validation, network errors, server errors
Empty states: 'No books yet. Add your first book!', 'No books found', 'No books match your filters'
Button states: Disabled state with visual indicator, loading text ('Saving...', 'Updating...')
Form validation: Inline error messages below fields on blur or submit
Hover states: Buttons and interactive elements show hover feedback
Focus states: Keyboard navigation shows clear focus indicators
Progress indicators for file uploads

features.description: Accessible user interface with keyboard navigation, screen reader support, ARIA labels, and sufficient color contrast
userStories: As a keyboard-only user, I want to navigate the entire app with keyboard so that I can use it without a mouse
As a screen reader user, I want proper labels and announcements so that I understand the interface
As a visually impaired user, I want sufficient color contrast so that I can read text easily
acceptanceCriteria: All interactive elements accessible via Tab key
Focus trap in modal dialogs
ESC key closes modals and dropdowns
Enter key submits forms and activates buttons
ARIA labels for all form inputs
ARIA role='dialog' for modals
ARIA live regions for toast notifications
Alt text for book cover images
Color contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 for normal text, >= 3:1 for large text
Form validation errors announced to screen readers
Skip to main content link for keyboard users
Semantic HTML (header, nav, main, footer, article)
Passes automated accessibility testing (axe, Lighthouse)

features.description: Fast page loads, quick API responses, optimized images, and efficient database queries for responsive user experience
userStories: As a user, I want pages to load quickly so that I don't waste time waiting
As a user, I want search results to appear instantly so that I can find books efficiently
acceptanceCriteria: Page load time <2 seconds for all screens
API response time <500ms for 95% of requests
Search results returned <1 second for collections up to 10,000 books
Images lazy loaded with progressive loading
Code splitting and lazy loading for routes
Database indexes on frequently queried columns (title, author, genre, year, isbn)
Query optimization to avoid N+1 problems
Connection pooling configured (HikariCP)
Pagination limits result set size
Debounced search input (300ms) to reduce API calls
Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) <0.1
First Contentful Paint (FCP) <1.5s
Lighthouse performance score >90
